name: Snickerdoodles (Mine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a baking sheet with parchment paper or spray with cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and cream of tartar.
4. In a large bowl, beat the margarine for 30 seconds until smooth.
5. Add the sugar and continue beating until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes.
6. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the milk and vanilla.
7. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
8. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls using a spoon or cookie scoop.
9. In a small bowl, mix together the sugar and cinnamon.
10. Roll each ball of dough in the sugar-cinnamon mixture until fully coated.
11. Place the rolled dough about 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet.
12. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown and set around the edges.
13. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes about 66 cookies.
